query:
SELECT lu.displayName, lu.userId, s.plan, s.status, s.stripeSubscriptionId
FROM line_users lu
LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON lu.userId = s.userId
WHERE lu.displayName IN ('高橋導成', '舞', 'まき')
ORDER BY lu.displayName;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3J5KDBVUjsrxvHe.root --database cX9NcQmb35cA4KMDW3eQdK --execute 
SELECT lu.displayName, lu.userId, s.plan, s.status, s.stripeSubscriptionId
FROM line_users lu
LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON lu.userId = s.userId
WHERE lu.displayName IN ('高橋導成', '舞', 'まき')
ORDER BY lu.displayName;
